title: Reliance I
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Reliance}} {{IndividualShip |image=[[File:Reliance.jpg]] |name=''Reliance I'' |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type=[[Republic command ship]]''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith]]'' |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem=Equipped |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen=Equipped |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems=*Atmospheric containment field *Infirmary[[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]] |role=*[[Battleship/Legends|Battleship]] *[[Command ship/Legends|Command ship]] |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles=[[Battle of Koros Major]] |affiliation=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |navy=[[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] |fleet= |owners= |captains=[[Fleet Captain/Legends|Fleet Captain]] [[Orley Vanicus]] |crewmembers=*[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] advisor [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] *[[Nomi Sunrider]] *[[Saul Karath]]''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Handbook]]'' |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|N-Nomi. Where am I?''"
"''You're still aboard ''Reliance I'', in the infirmary.|[[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] and [[Nomi Sunrider]]|audio=UlicNomiRelianceI-DLOTS.flac|}} The '''''Reliance I''''' was a [[Republic command ship]] used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] around [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]]. It served as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] during the opening stages of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. ==Characteristics== The ''Reliance I'' was equipped with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] and [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generators]] and a specialized bridge atmospheric containment field. The vessel was equipped with a shipboard infirmary, complete with [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] tanks and medical [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. ==History== Under the command of [[Fleet Captain/Legends|Fleet Captain]] [[Orley Vanicus]], she was damaged by an assault wave of [[CX-133 Chaos fighter|Chaos fighters]] at [[Empress Teta/Legends|Koros Major]] during the [[Battle of Koros Major]], when swarms of the small attack [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] [[CX-133 Chaos fighter]] were used in kamikaze strikes against the Republic fleet and one such craft crashed into the ''Reliance I''{{'s}} bridge viewports. Although the hole was quickly sealed off by an atmospheric force-field and the burning wreckage was cooled quickly, there were several casualties among the command crew. [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] himself was injured by flying shrapnel from the impact and spent some time with a fever in the ship's infirmary. ==Appearances== *[[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]] {{1stID|''Reliance I''}} *[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 2|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 2]] {{1st}} *''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Codex}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|28|The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth: A Guide to the ''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' Universe, Part 3}} *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Handbook]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{ID|Reliance}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Reliance I }} [[Category:Flagships]] [[Category:Republic command ships]] [[Category:Starships of the Galactic Republic]]
